# Intro (/docs)

<div className="stps-docs-intro">
  <strong>
    Solana Trust Protocol Standard
  </strong>

  <span>
    STPS assigns a Trust Score from 0 to 100 to DeFi protocols by reading governance,
    asset legitimacy and latent permission signals before critical execution.
  </span>
</div>

STPS exists because a blockchain transaction can be valid and still be unsafe. The protocol operates in that gap: validating risk, rule coherence and operational impact before a governance action, admin permission or critical transaction becomes irreversible.

## MVP scope

* Anchor program for protocol trust certificates.
* TypeScript Scoring Engine for risk events and score calculation.
* Indexer or event mock for Helius Webhook style inputs.
* SDK for querying protocol scores.
* Dashboard and docs for explaining certificate state, risk flags and score history.

## Certificate model

<div className="stps-certificate">
  <div className="stps-certificate-row">
    <span>
      Protocol
    </span>

    <span>
      dRiftyHA39MWEi3m9aunc5MzRF1JYuBsbn6VPcn33UH
    </span>
  </div>

  <div className="stps-certificate-row">
    <span>
      Trust Score
    </span>

    <span>
      42 / 100
    </span>
  </div>

  <div className="stps-certificate-row">
    <span>
      Risk Level
    </span>

    <span>
      High
    </span>
  </div>

  <div className="stps-certificate-row">
    <span>
      Active Flags
    </span>

    <span>
      TIMELOCK_REMOVED, MULTISIG_THRESHOLD_LOWERED, UNKNOWN_SIGNER_ADDED
    </span>
  </div>
</div>

## Demo chain of custody

<div className="stps-risk-chain">
  <div>
    <strong>
      85
    </strong>

    <span>
      Baseline certificate issued for the protocol.
    </span>

    <em>
      Low
    </em>
  </div>

  <div>
    <strong>
      65
    </strong>

    <span>
      <code>FLAG_TIMELOCK_REMOVED</code>

       detected in a critical governance action.
    </span>

    <em>
      Medium
    </em>
  </div>

  <div>
    <strong>
      42
    </strong>

    <span>
      Multisig threshold reduced from 5 to 1 and unknown signer added.
    </span>

    <em>
      High
    </em>
  </div>
</div>


# Getting Started (/docs/getting-started)

## What STPS validates

STPS is not a wallet reputation score. It is a protocol trust layer for critical Solana operations:

* Governance changes.
* Administrative permissions.
* Business rule updates.
* Asset legitimacy.
* Durable nonces and latent permissions.
* Architectural risk inside DeFi protocols.

## Initial architecture

```txt
Helius Webhooks
  -> Indexer
  -> Scoring Engine
  -> Anchor Program
  -> Dashboard + SDK
```

## Risk layers

| Layer | Scope                   | Example                                    |
| ----- | ----------------------- | ------------------------------------------ |
| L1    | Governance Intelligence | Multisig threshold reduced from 5 to 1     |
| L2    | Asset Legitimacy        | Low-liquidity collateral introduced        |
| L3    | Durable Nonce Watchdog  | Suspicious pre-signed transaction detected |

## Next pages to add

* Local setup.
* Scoring Engine API.
* Anchor certificate account.
* Indexer event contract.
* SDK query examples.


# Documentation Template (/docs/templates/documentation-template)

## Purpose

Describe what this page proves or enables.

## Context

Explain where this topic fits in the STPS architecture.

## Contract

List inputs, outputs, fields, flags or user-facing states.

## Example

```ts
const certificate = await stps.getProtocolCertificate(protocolAddress);
```

## Validation

Explain how someone can test or verify the behavior locally.
